question_intent: Average goals against for Eastern Conference teams in the NHL that have a coach with the award 'Jack Adams'

plan.question_intent: Average goals against for Eastern Conference teams in the NHL that have a coach with the award 'Jack Adams'
plan.detail_query: SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga) AS avg_goals_against FROM teams AS t JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (t.confid = ab.code) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (a.award = 'Jack Adams') GROUP BY t.name

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga) AS avg_goals_against
join_clauses: JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
blocks.notes: Returns team names and their average goals against for Eastern Conference teams in the NHL that have a coach with the award 'Jack Adams'

blocks.name: root
blocks.notes: Final scalar block that calculates the average goals against for the teams identified in the detail query

build_logs.notes: Returns team names and their average goals against for Eastern Conference teams in the NHL that have a coach with the award 'Jack Adams'

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (t.confid = ab.code)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (t.confid = ab.code) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (t.confid = ab.code) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (a.award = 'Jack Adams')
LIMIT 5

SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga) AS avg_goals_against
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (t.confid = ab.code) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (a.award = 'Jack Adams')
GROUP BY t.name

build_logs.notes: Final scalar block that calculates the average goals against for the teams identified in the detail query

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga) AS avg_goals_against
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (t.confid = ab.code) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (a.award = 'Jack Adams')
GROUP BY t.name) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(avg_goals_against) AS final_avg_goals_against
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga) AS avg_goals_against
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (t.confid = ab.code) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (a.award = 'Jack Adams')
GROUP BY t.name) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(pts) AS total_points
FROM (SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.pts, a.award
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average of the average goals allowed per team for Eastern Conference NHL teams whose coaches have won the Jack Adams award?
